ecosystem.microsoft: Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI Service

ecosystem.google: Vertex AI SDK, Gemini Code Assist

open_models.practical_use: General chat, RAG, fine-tuning, on-device inference, agent backbone
Edge deployment, instruction following, multilingual tasks, fine-tuning
Coding, RAG, enterprise deployment, European data-residency use cases

Multilingual (especially Chinese-English), coding, reasoning, long-context tasks

open_models.models: Command R+, Command R, Aya Expanse 32B
open_models.practical_use: Enterprise RAG, multilingual retrieval, grounded generation, tool use
Bilingual chat, instruction following, long-context document processing
Sovereign AI deployments, Arabic NLP, research, on-premise hosting

best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for highest quality, nuanced conversation, and enterprise features; use open for self-hosted privacy-sensitive or cost-sensitive deployments
Use closed for complex multi-file refactoring and IDE integration; use open for air-gapped or IP-sensitive codebases

best_tools.best_closed: Azure OpenAI + AI Search, Gemini 2.5 Pro
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for enterprise-grade managed pipelines; use open for full data control, custom chunking, and cost optimization at scale

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI Responses API, Claude MCP Agents
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for production reliability and tool-calling breadth; use open for custom orchestration, self-hosted tool servers, and experimental multi-agent architectures
Use closed for real-time web search with citations out-of-the-box; use open for private intranet search or custom knowledge-base grounding
Use closed for highest prompt adherence and photorealism in production; use open for local generation, custom fine-tuned styles, and IP ownership requirements
Use closed for polished output and longer clip generation; use open for research prototyping and self-hosted pipelines where cost or privacy matters
Use closed for real-time streaming STT/TTS and voice cloning in production; use open for offline transcription, low-latency edge voice apps, and cost reduction
Use closed when targeting specific certified device ecosystems; use open for custom hardware deployments, embedded systems, and offline-first mobile applications

best_tools.best_closed: OpenAI Fine-tuning API, Vertex AI Tuning
best_tools.when_to_use: Use closed for managed, no-infrastructure fine-tuning with quick iteration; use open for full weight ownership, custom training loops, and domain-specific adaptation at scale
Use closed for vision-language tasks requiring highest accuracy across diverse inputs; use open for self-hosted document understanding, chart analysis, and multimodal RAG pipelines
